reasoning_summary: The technical specifications of the BMW i5 models were extracted directly from the provided Thai brochure pages. Each option and specification was mapped to its respective model, ensuring strict adherence to logical exclusion rules and accurate representation of empty values as '-'. No logical conflicts were detected across the sound system, suspension, or transmission categories.
